disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Thick friable honey-coloured (golden) crusts on an erythematous base around the nose/mouth, spreading via scratching
trigger_question_examples: Are the sores forming golden/honey-coloured crusts on red skin?
Is the yellow fluid spreading the sores to new spots?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes, golden-yellow crusts on red skin, and it's spread to the chin where they scratched.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No rapidly spreading hot/hard redness across the cheeks toward the eyes, and no high fever/lethargy/refusing all fluids (spreading-infection/systemic screen)
trigger_question_examples: Is the redness spreading across the cheeks toward the eyes, hot and hard? Any high fever, unusual sleepiness, or refusing all fluids?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, it's not spreading toward the eyes or hot/hard, no high fever, and they're still drinking.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Not grouped clear vesicles with a neuropathic prodrome, and no underlying severe eczema (HSV/eczema-herpeticum screen)
trigger_question_examples: Are they grouped clear blisters that tingled/burned first, or golden crusts? Any background eczema?
Any clusters of small identical blisters?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: They're golden crusts, not clusters of clear blisters, and no background eczema.
